features.name: SQLite Database Schema
features.description: SQLAlchemy ORM models for users, projects, and tasks. Uses SQLite with file-based storage. Models: User (email, hashed_password, name), Project (name, description, owner_id), Task (title, description, project_id, assignee_id, status).

work_history.note: Validated: SQLAlchemy ORM models for User, Project, Task exist in src/fixture/models.py; SQLite database.py with correct engine/session setup; 26 backend tests pass including test_models.py

features.completion_notes: SQLAlchemy ORM models validated: User (email, hashed_password, display_name), Project (name, description, color, user_id), Task (title, status, project_id, user_id). SQLite file-based storage. All 26 tests pass.

features.name: Frontend Project Setup
features.description: Next.js 14 app with Tailwind CSS. App Router structure with pages for login, register, dashboard, projects, and tasks. API client using axios with empty baseURL and Next.js rewrites to proxy /api/* to backend port 8000. Use next.config.mjs (not .ts).

work_history.note: Validated: Next.js 14.2.21, Tailwind CSS, App Router with pages for login/register/dashboard/projects/tasks. api.ts uses empty baseURL. next.config.mjs with /api/* rewrites. Production build succeeds (11 static pages).

features.completion_notes: Next.js 14 with Tailwind, App Router, all pages exist, api.ts with empty baseURL, next.config.mjs with rewrites, postcss.config.js (CommonJS), production build passes.

features.name: Health Check and App Config
features.description: GET /api/health returns {status: "healthy"}. Backend entry point at src/fixture/main.py.

work_history.note: Validated: GET /api/health in main.py returns {status, version, timestamp, service}. test_health.py passes. FastAPI app correctly configured with all routers registered.

features.completion_notes: GET /api/health returns {status: healthy, version, timestamp, service}. FastAPI entry point with CORS, lifespan, all routers registered. test_health.py passes.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: POST /api/auth/register accepts {email, password, name}, creates user with bcrypt-hashed password, returns JWT. POST /api/auth/login validates credentials, returns {token}. GET /api/users/me returns current user profile. JWT middleware extracts user from Authorization: Bearer header.

work_history.note: Validated: auth.py with bcrypt password hashing, JWT creation/validation; routers/auth.py with POST /api/auth/register, POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/auth/me; GET /api/users/me also in main.py; all test_auth.py tests pass.

features.completion_notes: POST /api/auth/register, POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/auth/me and GET /api/users/me all implemented. bcrypt + JWT auth. All 5 auth tests pass.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Overview page at /dashboard showing project and task counts with quick links.

work_history.note: Validated: dashboard/page.tsx shows project and task counts from API. Uses Layout wrapper. Displays user welcome message. Build passes.

features.completion_notes: Dashboard page at /dashboard shows project/task count cards, fetches /api/projects and /api/tasks. Next.js build passes.

features.name: Navigation and Layout
features.description: Sidebar navigation with route highlighting and logout button. AuthGuard component protects authenticated routes. Layout component wraps all authenticated pages.

work_history.note: Validated: Sidebar.tsx with route highlighting and logout; AuthGuard.tsx protecting routes; Layout.tsx wrapping authenticated pages. Build passes.

features.completion_notes: Sidebar with route highlighting (Dashboard/Projects/Tasks) and logout. AuthGuard validates JWT via /api/auth/me. Layout wraps all authenticated pages. Build passes.

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Full CRUD for projects. POST /api/projects creates project with owner_id from auth. GET /api/projects lists user's projects. GET /api/projects/{id} returns single project. DELETE /api/projects/{id} removes project. Frontend pages: /projects (list), /projects/new (create form).

work_history.note: Validated: routers/projects.py with full CRUD (GET/POST /api/projects, GET/DELETE /api/projects/{id}); frontend /projects list page and /projects/new create form. 6 project tests pass.

features.completion_notes: Full CRUD for projects. Backend: GET/POST /api/projects, GET/DELETE /api/projects/{id} with auth. Frontend: /projects list page, /projects/new create form. 6 tests pass.

features.name: Task Management
features.description: Full CRUD for tasks with project assignment. POST /api/tasks creates task with project_id. GET /api/tasks lists user's tasks. DELETE /api/tasks/{id} removes task. Frontend pages: /tasks (list), /tasks/new (create form with project selector).

work_history.note: Validated: routers/tasks.py with full CRUD (GET/POST /api/tasks, GET/DELETE /api/tasks/{id}); frontend /tasks list with status badges and /tasks/new with project selector. 8 task tests pass.

features.completion_notes: Full CRUD for tasks with project assignment. Backend: GET/POST /api/tasks, GET/DELETE /api/tasks/{id} with auth. Frontend: /tasks list, /tasks/new with project selector. 8 tests pass.
